homepage.heroSubline: Reliable garage door installation and repair services. Winter weather is no match for our expertise.
aboutText: Aker Doors, Inc. started with a simple goal: provide Minneapolis homeowners with dependable garage door solutions. We're a family-owned business, born and raised right here in the Twin Cities, and we understand the unique challenges our climate presents.

We don't cut corners. Our team uses only the highest-quality materials and proven installation techniques. We believe in doing the job right the first time, ensuring your garage door operates smoothly and safely for years to come.

We're proud to be part of the Minneapolis community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to build lasting relationships with our customers. When you choose Aker Doors, you're choosing a neighbor you can trust.

services.name: Garage Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert garage door installation for Minneapolis homes.
services.description:
Installing a new garage door is a significant investment, and proper installation is crucial for its performance and longevity. At Aker Doors, Inc., our experienced technicians handle every aspect of the installation process with precision and care. We start by assessing your specific needs and recommending the best garage door type and style for your home, considering factors like insulation, security, and aesthetics. We work with all major brands and offer a wide selection of materials, including steel, wood, and composite. 

Our installation process includes removing your old door, preparing the opening, installing the new door and track system, connecting the opener, and ensuring proper alignment and functionality. We also pay close attention to weather sealing to prevent drafts and moisture damage, which is especially important in Minneapolis winters. We’ll thoroughly test the door’s operation and safety features before we leave and answer any questions you may have. We also provide haul-away services for the old garage door.

We understand the architectural diversity of Minneapolis, from the historic homes in Northeast to the modern condos downtown. Our team is skilled in installing garage doors that complement a variety of architectural styles. With Aker Doors, you can be confident that your new garage door will enhance the curb appeal and value of your home.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Selection - We help you choose the right door for your needs and budget.
Step 2: Removal of Old Door - Careful removal and responsible disposal of your existing garage door.
Step 3: Professional Installation - Precise installation of the new door, tracks, and opener.
Step 4: Testing and Adjustment - Thorough testing to ensure smooth and safe operation.

faq.question: How long does garage door installation take?
faq.answer: Typically, a standard garage door installation takes between 4 to 8 hours, depending on the complexity of the project and any necessary modifications to the opening.

faq.question: What type of garage door is best for Minneapolis winters?
faq.answer: Insulated steel garage doors are an excellent choice for Minneapolis winters. They provide superior insulation, preventing heat loss and keeping your garage warmer.

faq.question: Do you offer warranties on your installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive warranties on both the garage doors and our installation services. We stand behind our work and are committed to your satisfaction.

services.name: Garage Door Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable garage door repair services in Minneapolis.
services.description:
A malfunctioning garage door can be a major inconvenience and a security risk. Aker Doors, Inc. provides prompt and reliable garage door repair services throughout Minneapolis and the surrounding suburbs. Our experienced technicians are equipped to handle a wide range of issues, from broken springs and cables to faulty openers and damaged panels.

We understand that garage door problems often occur unexpectedly. That's why we offer 24/7 emergency repair services to address urgent situations. Whether your door is stuck open, won't close, or is making unusual noises, we'll respond quickly to diagnose the problem and provide an effective solution. We carry a full inventory of replacement parts to minimize downtime and get your door back in working order as soon as possible.

We're familiar with the common garage door issues that arise in Minneapolis due to our harsh winters. Freeze-thaw cycles can cause damage to tracks and rollers, while heavy snow and ice can strain the opener. Our technicians are trained to identify and address these specific challenges, ensuring your garage door is prepared to withstand the elements. We also offer preventative maintenance services to help you avoid costly repairs in the future. We'll inspect your door, lubricate moving parts, and make any necessary adjustments to keep it running smoothly.
process: Step 1: Diagnostic Assessment - Thorough inspection to identify the root cause of the problem.
Step 2: Transparent Quote - Clear and upfront pricing for the necessary repairs.
Step 3: Expert Repair - Skilled technicians perform the repairs using quality parts.
Step 4: Testing and Verification - Ensuring the door operates safely and smoothly after the repair.

faq.question: How much does garage door repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of garage door repair varies depending on the type of problem and the parts required. We provide free estimates before starting any work, so you'll know exactly what to expect.

faq.question: How often should I have my garage door serviced?
faq.answer: We recommend having your garage door serviced at least once a year to ensure it's operating safely and efficiently. Regular maintenance can help prevent costly repairs down the road.

faq.question: What are the signs that my garage door needs repair?
faq.answer: Signs that your garage door needs repair include unusual noises, slow or jerky movement, difficulty opening or closing, and visible damage to the door or its components.

services.name: Garage Door Opener Repair
services.shortDescription: Minneapolis' reliable garage door opener repair and replacement.
services.description:
A malfunctioning garage door opener can leave you stranded outside in the Minneapolis cold or compromise your home's security. Aker Doors, Inc. specializes in repairing and replacing garage door openers of all makes and models. Whether your opener is making strange noises, not responding to the remote, or simply not working at all, our experienced technicians can diagnose the problem and provide an effective solution.

We understand the importance of a properly functioning garage door opener for your convenience and safety. That's why we offer same-day service and emergency repairs to address urgent issues. We carry a wide selection of replacement parts, including motors, circuit boards, and remote controls, to minimize downtime and get your opener back in working order quickly.

We're familiar with the challenges that Minneapolis weather can pose to garage door openers. Extreme temperature fluctuations can cause components to fail, while power outages can disrupt their programming. Our technicians are trained to troubleshoot these specific issues and provide solutions that will withstand the elements. We also offer recommendations for upgrading to newer, more reliable opener models with advanced features like smartphone connectivity and battery backup.
process: Step 1: Opener Diagnostics - Identifying the specific issue with your garage door opener.
Step 2: Repair or Replacement - Providing the best solution for your opener's problem.
Step 3: Programming and Testing - Ensuring proper functionality of remotes and safety features.
Step 4: Customer Education - Explaining the operation and maintenance of your opener.

faq.question: Why is my garage door opener not working?
faq.answer: There are several reasons why your garage door opener might not be working, including a dead battery in the remote, a power outage, a broken motor, or a faulty circuit board. Our technicians can diagnose the problem and provide the appropriate repair.

faq.question: How long do garage door openers last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of a garage door opener typically ranges from 10 to 15 years, depending on the quality of the unit and how often it's used. Regular maintenance can help extend its lifespan.

faq.question: Should I repair or replace my garage door opener?
faq.answer: Whether to repair or replace your garage door opener depends on the age and condition of the unit, as well as the cost of repairs. If your opener is more than 10 years old and requires extensive repairs, it may be more cost-effective to replace it with a new model.

services.name: Garage Door Spring Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert garage door spring repair for Minneapolis homeowners.
services.description:
Garage door springs are under immense tension and play a critical role in the safe and smooth operation of your door. When a spring breaks, it can be dangerous to attempt repairs yourself. Aker Doors, Inc. provides professional garage door spring repair and replacement services in Minneapolis. Our trained technicians have the expertise and equipment to safely handle spring repairs and ensure your door is operating correctly.

We understand the urgency of a broken garage door spring. That's why we offer 24/7 emergency service to address these situations promptly. We carry a full inventory of replacement springs to match your door's specific requirements and ensure a proper fit. Our technicians will carefully remove the broken spring and install a new one, making sure it's properly tensioned and balanced.

We're familiar with the types of springs commonly used in Minneapolis homes, including torsion springs and extension springs. We'll assess your door's configuration and recommend the best spring type for your needs. We also offer recommendations for upgrading to heavier-duty springs that can withstand the rigors of daily use and the harsh Minnesota climate.
process: Step 1: Safety Assessment - Ensuring the area is safe for spring replacement.
Step 2: Spring Removal - Safely removing the broken or damaged spring.
Step 3: New Spring Installation - Installing the correct spring with proper tension.
Step 4: Balance and Testing - Verifying the door's balance and smooth operation.

faq.question: How do I know if my garage door spring is broken?
faq.answer: Signs of a broken garage door spring include a loud bang, a door that's difficult to lift, a door that's hanging unevenly, or a visible break in the spring itself.

faq.question: Can I replace a garage door spring myself?
faq.answer: No, replacing a garage door spring is extremely dangerous and should only be done by a trained professional. The springs are under high tension and can cause serious injury if handled improperly.

faq.question: How long do garage door springs last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of a garage door spring typically ranges from 7 to 12 years, depending on the quality of the spring and how often the door is used. Regular maintenance can help extend its lifespan.

services.name: Garage Door Cable Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable garage door cable repair and replacement in Minneapolis.
services.description:
Garage door cables work in conjunction with the springs to lift and lower your garage door safely. If a cable breaks or becomes frayed, it can cause the door to become unbalanced or even collapse. Aker Doors, Inc. provides professional garage door cable repair and replacement services in Minneapolis. Our experienced technicians can quickly diagnose cable issues and provide effective solutions to restore your door's functionality.

We understand the inconvenience and safety concerns associated with damaged garage door cables. That's why we offer prompt and reliable service to address these issues. We carry a wide selection of replacement cables to match your door's specific requirements. Our technicians will carefully remove the damaged cable and install a new one, ensuring it's properly secured and tensioned.

We're familiar with the different types of cable systems used in Minneapolis homes, including torsion cable systems and extension cable systems. We'll assess your door's configuration and recommend the best cable type for your needs. We also offer recommendations for upgrading to heavier-duty cables that can withstand the rigors of daily use and the harsh Minnesota climate.
process: Step 1: Cable Inspection - Assessing the condition of the garage door cables.
Step 2: Safety Measures - Ensuring the door is secured before cable replacement.
Step 3: Cable Replacement - Installing new cables with proper tension and alignment.
Step 4: Door Balancing - Adjusting the door's balance for smooth operation.

faq.question: What are the signs of a damaged garage door cable?
faq.answer: Signs of a damaged garage door cable include frayed or broken strands, a door that's hanging unevenly, a door that's difficult to lift, or a cable that's visibly loose or detached.

faq.question: Can I repair a garage door cable myself?
faq.answer: No, repairing a garage door cable is dangerous and should only be done by a trained professional. The cables are under high tension and can cause serious injury if handled improperly.

faq.question: How long do garage door cables last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of a garage door cable typically ranges from 5 to 10 years, depending on the quality of the cable and how often the door is used. Regular maintenance can help extend its lifespan.

services.name: Garage Door Weather Sealing
services.shortDescription: Protect your garage from Minneapolis weather with expert sealing.
services.description:
Minneapolis winters demand robust protection against the elements. Aker Doors, Inc. offers professional garage door weather sealing services to keep your garage warm, dry, and energy-efficient. Proper weather sealing prevents drafts, moisture, and pests from entering your garage, protecting your belongings and reducing energy costs.

Our experienced technicians will thoroughly inspect your garage door and identify any gaps or cracks where air and moisture can penetrate. We'll then install high-quality weather stripping around the perimeter of the door and along the bottom edge to create a tight seal. We use durable, weather-resistant materials that are designed to withstand the harsh Minnesota climate.

We also offer recommendations for insulating your garage door to further enhance its energy efficiency. Insulating your garage door can help reduce heat loss in the winter and keep your garage cooler in the summer, saving you money on energy bills. Our team is skilled in sealing all types of garage doors, ensuring a perfect fit and optimal performance.
process: Step 1: Inspection - Identifying gaps and cracks in the door's sealing.
Step 2: Material Selection - Choosing the right weather stripping for your door.
Step 3: Professional Installation - Applying new weather stripping for a tight seal.
Step 4: Quality Check - Ensuring complete protection against the elements.

faq.question: Why is weather sealing important for my garage door?
faq.answer: Weather sealing prevents drafts, moisture, and pests from entering your garage, protecting your belongings and reducing energy costs. It also helps to maintain a more consistent temperature in your garage.

faq.question: How often should I replace my garage door weather stripping?
faq.answer: We recommend replacing your garage door weather stripping every 2 to 3 years, or sooner if you notice any signs of damage or wear.

faq.question: What type of weather stripping is best for my garage door?
faq.answer: The best type of weather stripping for your garage door depends on the type of door and the size of the gaps you're trying to seal. Our technicians can assess your specific needs and recommend the appropriate weather stripping.

reviews.name: Sarah J.
reviews.text: Aker Doors saved the day! Our garage door spring broke on a Saturday morning, and we couldn't get our car out. They were here within an hour and had it fixed quickly. The technician was professional and friendly. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Michael K.
reviews.text: Our old garage door opener finally gave out. Aker Doors helped us choose a new one with all the latest features. The installation was smooth and efficient. We are very happy with the new opener and the service we received.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: We recently built a new garage and needed a new door installed. Aker Doors provided excellent service from start to finish. They helped us choose the perfect door for our home and installed it with precision. The door looks great and works perfectly!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Aker Doors repaired our garage door after a minor accident. The technician was able to quickly assess the damage and make the necessary repairs. The door is as good as new! They were very professional and reasonably priced.

reviews.name: Jessica M.
reviews.text: We hired Aker Doors to weather seal our garage door before winter. They did a thorough job, and we've already noticed a difference in the temperature inside the garage. They were prompt, courteous, and did great work.

reviews.name: Tom S.
reviews.text: Excellent service! My garage door spring broke late at night, and Aker Doors had someone out to fix it within an hour. The technician was knowledgeable and efficient. I highly recommend them for any garage door needs.
